channel.title: 中国日报-体育
channel.description: 中国日报-体育 RSS Feed

item.title: Sowing the seeds of success
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Dedicated devotees of grassroots game confident their hard work will reap rewards

item.title: Milestone victory for skate sensation Zagitova
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: World junior figure-skating champion Alina Zagitova on Saturday led a Russian one-two to capture her first Grand Prix Final crown, maintaining a superb performance in her senior debut season.

item.title: Vonn shaken by injury scare
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: ST MORITZ, Switzerland - American Lindsey Vonn sustained an injury during the World Cup super-G race in St Moritz on Saturday as Switzerland's Lara Gut crashed halfway down the course.

item.title: Vonn shaken by injury scare
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: ST MORITZ, Switzerland - American Lindsey Vonn sustained an injury during the World Cup super-G race in St Moritz on Saturday as Switzerland's Lara Gut crashed halfway down the course.

item.title: Vonn shaken by injury scare
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: ST MORITZ, Switzerland - American Lindsey Vonn sustained an injury during the World Cup super-G race in St Moritz on Saturday as Switzerland's Lara Gut crashed halfway down the course.

item.title: Top four all win in Spain's matchday 15
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Luis Suarez and Leo Messi both scored as FC Barcelona won 2-0 away to Villarreal to maintain their 5-point lead at the top of the Liga Santander at the end of matchday 15 of the season, which was played over this weekend.

item.title: Top four all win in Spain's matchday 15
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Luis Suarez and Leo Messi both scored as FC Barcelona won 2-0 away to Villarreal to maintain their 5-point lead at the top of the Liga Santander at the end of matchday 15 of the season, which was played over this weekend.

item.title: Top four all win in Spain's matchday 15
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Luis Suarez and Leo Messi both scored as FC Barcelona won 2-0 away to Villarreal to maintain their 5-point lead at the top of the Liga Santander at the end of matchday 15 of the season, which was played over this weekend.

item.title: Top four all win in Spain's matchday 15
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Luis Suarez and Leo Messi both scored as FC Barcelona won 2-0 away to Villarreal to maintain their 5-point lead at the top of the Liga Santander at the end of matchday 15 of the season, which was played over this weekend.

item.title: Top four all win in Spain's matchday 15
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Luis Suarez and Leo Messi both scored as FC Barcelona won 2-0 away to Villarreal to maintain their 5-point lead at the top of the Liga Santander at the end of matchday 15 of the season, which was played over this weekend.

item.title: Ronaldinho planning 2018 farewell tour
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronaldinho is planning a series of testimonial matches with his former clubs before officially announcing his retirement from football.

item.title: Ronaldinho planning 2018 farewell tour
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronaldinho is planning a series of testimonial matches with his former clubs before officially announcing his retirement from football.

item.title: Ronaldinho planning 2018 farewell tour
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronaldinho is planning a series of testimonial matches with his former clubs before officially announcing his retirement from football.

item.title: Ronaldinho planning 2018 farewell tour
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronaldinho is planning a series of testimonial matches with his former clubs before officially announcing his retirement from football.

item.title: O'Sullivan wins sixth UK Championship title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan beat Shaun Murphy 10-5 in the final of the UK Championship to win a record-equalling sixth UK Championship title at York's Barbican Center on Sunday.

item.title: O'Sullivan wins sixth UK Championship title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan beat Shaun Murphy 10-5 in the final of the UK Championship to win a record-equalling sixth UK Championship title at York's Barbican Center on Sunday.

item.title: O'Sullivan wins sixth UK Championship title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan beat Shaun Murphy 10-5 in the final of the UK Championship to win a record-equalling sixth UK Championship title at York's Barbican Center on Sunday.

item.title: O'Sullivan wins sixth UK Championship title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan beat Shaun Murphy 10-5 in the final of the UK Championship to win a record-equalling sixth UK Championship title at York's Barbican Center on Sunday.

item.title: Chinese women qualify for PyeongChang Olympic curling
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The Chinese women's curling team became the first to gain a place at the PyeongChang 2018 Winter Olympic Games through a qualification event on Saturday.

item.title: Chinese women qualify for PyeongChang Olympic curling
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The Chinese women's curling team became the first to gain a place at the PyeongChang 2018 Winter Olympic Games through a qualification event on Saturday.

item.title: Chinese women qualify for PyeongChang Olympic curling
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The Chinese women's curling team became the first to gain a place at the PyeongChang 2018 Winter Olympic Games through a qualification event on Saturday.

item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The Chinese women's curling team became the first to gain a place at the PyeongChang 2018 Winter Olympic Games through a qualification event on Saturday.

item.author: 中国日报-体育

item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The Chinese women's curling team became the first to gain a place at the PyeongChang 2018 Winter Olympic Games through a qualification event on Saturday.

item.title: Russian Yuskov sets world record in 1,500m speed skating
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Russian Yuskov sets world record in 1,500m speed skating

item.title: Russian Yuskov sets world record in 1,500m speed skating
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Russian Yuskov sets world record in 1,500m speed skating

item.title: Russian Yuskov sets world record in 1,500m speed skating
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Russian Yuskov sets world record in 1,500m speed skating

item.title: Lakers win over Hornets 110-99 at second stop of road trip
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Lakers win over Hornets 110-99 at second stop of road trip

item.title: River win second straight Copa Argentina title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: River Plate secured their second consecutive Copa Argentina title by defeating Atletico Tucuman 2-1 in the final here on Saturday.

item.title: Colo-Colo win Chilean top flight title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Colo-Colo secured their 32nd Chilean first division title by defeating Huachipato 3-0 away from home in their last match of the season on Saturday.

item.title: Wire to wire win for Renuka
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Renuka Suksukont captured her first international title on Saturday when the Thai completed a wire-to-wire victory at the ICTSI Philippine Ladies Masters in Laguna province.

item.title: Wire to wire win for Renuka
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Renuka Suksukont captured her first international title on Saturday when the Thai completed a wire-to-wire victory at the ICTSI Philippine Ladies Masters in Laguna province.

item.title: Easy win for Real Madrid over a disappointing Sevilla
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Real Madrid enjoyed a surprisingly easy win at home on Saturday, beating Sevilla 5-0 in their last game of La Liga before flying out to the World Club Championships.

item.title: Easy win for Real Madrid over a disappointing Sevilla
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Real Madrid enjoyed a surprisingly easy win at home on Saturday, beating Sevilla 5-0 in their last game of La Liga before flying out to the World Club Championships.

item.title: Easy win for Real Madrid over a disappointing Sevilla
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Real Madrid enjoyed a surprisingly easy win at home on Saturday, beating Sevilla 5-0 in their last game of La Liga before flying out to the World Club Championships.

item.title: Easy win for Real Madrid over a disappointing Sevilla
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Real Madrid enjoyed a surprisingly easy win at home on Saturday, beating Sevilla 5-0 in their last game of La Liga before flying out to the World Club Championships.

item.title: Kenyan athletic chiefs accuse minister of interfering with athletes
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Athletics Kenya officials on Saturday protested against the cabinet secretary for sports over what they said was the minister's attempt to take over the running of athletics in the country.

item.title: Kenyan athletic chiefs accuse minister of interfering with athletes
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Athletics Kenya officials on Saturday protested against the cabinet secretary for sports over what they said was the minister's attempt to take over the running of athletics in the country.

item.title: Peru U18 captain Saravia joins Brazil's Gremio on loan
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Brazil's Gremio have signed Peru under-18 captain Marco Saravia on a 12-month loan as they bolster their squad for the 2019 season.

item.title: Peru U18 captain Saravia joins Brazil's Gremio on loan
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Brazil's Gremio have signed Peru under-18 captain Marco Saravia on a 12-month loan as they bolster their squad for the 2019 season.

item.title: O'Sullivan, Murphy to fight for UK Championship title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Five-time titlist Ronnie O'Sullivan reached the final of the UK Snooker Championship afte beating Stephen Maguire 6-4 in the semifinals at York on Saturday.

item.title: O'Sullivan, Murphy to fight for UK Championship title
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Five-time titlist Ronnie O'Sullivan reached the final of the UK Snooker Championship afte beating Stephen Maguire 6-4 in the semifinals at York on Saturday.

item.title: China ties South Korea 2-2 in EAFF E-1 Football Championship
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Marcello Lippi, head coach of China, reacts during the men's football match between South Korea and China at the EAFF E-1 football championship in Tokyo, Japan, Dec 9, 2017.

item.title: China ties South Korea 2-2 in EAFF E-1 Football Championship
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Marcello Lippi, head coach of China, reacts during the men's football match between South Korea and China at the EAFF E-1 football championship in Tokyo, Japan, Dec 9, 2017.

item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Marcello Lippi, head coach of China, reacts during the men's football match between South Korea and China at the EAFF E-1 football championship in Tokyo, Japan, Dec 9, 2017.

item.title: China ties South Korea 2-2 in EAFF E-1 Football Championship
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: China held South Korea to a 2-2 draw in the 2017 EAFF E-1 Football Championship on Saturday:

item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: China held South Korea to a 2-2 draw in the 2017 EAFF E-1 Football Championship on Saturday:

item.title: Guerrero to appeal against doping ban: lawyer
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Guerrero to appeal against doping ban: lawyer

item.title: Guerrero to appeal against doping ban: lawyer
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Guerrero to appeal against doping ban: lawyer

item.title: Ex-Brazill defender Juan renews Flamengo contract
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Former Bayer Leverkusen and Roma center back Juan has signed a new one-year contract with Brazilian club Flamengo, extending his professional career to the 23rd season.

item.title: Ex-Brazill defender Juan renews Flamengo contract
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Former Bayer Leverkusen and Roma center back Juan has signed a new one-year contract with Brazilian club Flamengo, extending his professional career to the 23rd season.

item.title: Shakhtar sign Brazil U20 defender Dodo
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Brazil under-20 right back Dodo has joined Shakhtar Donetsk from Brazilian Serie A side Coritiba, the Ukrainian champions said on Friday.

item.title: Shakhtar sign Brazil U20 defender Dodo
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Brazil under-20 right back Dodo has joined Shakhtar Donetsk from Brazilian Serie A side Coritiba, the Ukrainian champions said on Friday.

item.title: Germany FA honours former captain Lahm
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The German Football Association (DFB) named Philipp Lahm as the honorary captain of the national team in Frankfurt on Friday.

item.title: Zidane confident Ronaldo will remain at Real Madrid
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Real Madrid coach Zinedine Zidane said on Friday that he believed Cristiano Ronaldo would end his career at the club.

item.title: Ronaldo's high-five celebration
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: PARIS - A decade of dominance by the world's two best soccer players has left Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi tied with five Ballon d'Or awards each.

item.title: Streaking Rockets jump on Jazz
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY, Utah - James Harden and the Houston Rockets are defined by their explosive offense, and it got the best of the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.

item.title: Buzzer-beater lifts Lakers over Sixers
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: PHILADELPHIA - When LaVar Ball started taunting Philly fans in the fourth quarter, it only turned up the volume on an already raucous atmosphere on Thursday night.

item.title: Driving the game to a new era
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Golf's revival in China has gained a major boost with a 300 million yuan ($45 million) investment to drive the once-suspended PGA Tour China series to new heights.

item.title: Klopp cautions rampant Reds
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Jurgen Klopp urged his Liverpool players not to succumb to the hype generated by their own scintillating performances after they crushed Spartak Moscow to reach the Champions League knockout rounds in emphatic fashion.

item.title: Klopp cautions rampant Reds
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Jurgen Klopp urged his Liverpool players not to succumb to the hype generated by their own scintillating performances after they crushed Spartak Moscow to reach the Champions League knockout rounds in emphatic fashion.

item.title: Klopp cautions rampant Reds
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Jurgen Klopp urged his Liverpool players not to succumb to the hype generated by their own scintillating performances after they crushed Spartak Moscow to reach the Champions League knockout rounds in emphatic fashion.

item.title: Klopp cautions rampant Reds
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Jurgen Klopp urged his Liverpool players not to succumb to the hype generated by their own scintillating performances after they crushed Spartak Moscow to reach the Champions League knockout rounds in emphatic fashion.

item.title: US companies find chances to invest in Zhangjiakou
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: As this year's international skiing festival kicked off in Chongli district of Zhangjiakou, North China's Hebei province, many entrepreneurs from the Untied States have come here in groups to make business deals with local governments to develop the winter sports industry.

item.title: Initiative signed to promote winter sports in China
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: A China youth ice hockey development initiative was launched Thursday in Beijing, calling for further popularity of the sport in China in response to the â300 million people on ice" national campaign in the run-up to the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics.

item.title: Initiative signed to promote winter sports in China
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: A China youth ice hockey development initiative was launched Thursday in Beijing, calling for further popularity of the sport in China in response to the â300 million people on ice" national campaign in the run-up to the 2022 Beijing Winter Olympics.

item.title: Spurs saunter onwards in European adventure
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: LONDON - Washing away the pain of last year's botched Champions League campaign, Tottenham completed this group stage as Europe's leading team.

item.title: Spurs saunter onwards in European adventure
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: LONDON - Washing away the pain of last year's botched Champions League campaign, Tottenham completed this group stage as Europe's leading team.

item.title: Spurs saunter onwards in European adventure
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: LONDON - Washing away the pain of last year's botched Champions League campaign, Tottenham completed this group stage as Europe's leading team.

item.title: Spurs saunter onwards in European adventure
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: LONDON - Washing away the pain of last year's botched Champions League campaign, Tottenham completed this group stage as Europe's leading team.

item.title: Ronaldo racks up another milestone
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MADRID - Cristiano Ronaldo set yet another Champions League record on Wednesday, scoring in Real Madrid's 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund to become the first player to find the net in all six group-stage matches.

item.title: Ronaldo racks up another milestone
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MADRID - Cristiano Ronaldo set yet another Champions League record on Wednesday, scoring in Real Madrid's 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund to become the first player to find the net in all six group-stage matches.

item.title: Ronaldo racks up another milestone
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MADRID - Cristiano Ronaldo set yet another Champions League record on Wednesday, scoring in Real Madrid's 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund to become the first player to find the net in all six group-stage matches.

item.title: Ronaldo racks up another milestone
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MADRID - Cristiano Ronaldo set yet another Champions League record on Wednesday, scoring in Real Madrid's 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund to become the first player to find the net in all six group-stage matches.

item.title: Transfer binge gets red card
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Chinese Super League clubs have been warned to tighten their purse strings or risk hamstringing the nation's soccer push.

item.title: Transfer binge gets red card
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Chinese Super League clubs have been warned to tighten their purse strings or risk hamstringing the nation's soccer push.

item.title: Transfer binge gets red card
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Chinese Super League clubs have been warned to tighten their purse strings or risk hamstringing the nation's soccer push.

item.title: Transfer binge gets red card
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Chinese Super League clubs have been warned to tighten their purse strings or risk hamstringing the nation's soccer push.

item.title: Chinese skiers hit the slopes in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Chinese skiers practice at a ski resort in Beijing's Yanqing district on Dec 7. The skiing team, composed of 18 members from all walks of life, was set up in July to promote winter sports in the capital.

item.title: Chinese skiers hit the slopes in Beijing
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Chinese skiers practice at a ski resort in Beijing's Yanqing district on Dec 7. The skiing team, composed of 18 members from all walks of life, was set up in July to promote winter sports in the capital.

item.description: Chinese skiers practice at a ski resort in Beijing's Yanqing district on Dec 7. The skiing team, composed of 18 members from all walks of life, was set up in July to promote winter sports in the capital.

item.description: Chinese skiers practice at a ski resort in Beijing's Yanqing district on Dec 7. The skiing team, composed of 18 members from all walks of life, was set up in July to promote winter sports in the capital.

item.title: Evergrande faces tricky test in ACL
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KUALA LUMPUR - Two-time champion Guangzhou Evergrande has been handed a potentially bumpy ride to the knockout stages of the 2018 Asian Champions League after the draw for the group phase of next year's competition was made on Wednesday.

item.title: Evergrande faces tricky test in ACL
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KUALA LUMPUR - Two-time champion Guangzhou Evergrande has been handed a potentially bumpy ride to the knockout stages of the 2018 Asian Champions League after the draw for the group phase of next year's competition was made on Wednesday.

item.title: Evergrande faces tricky test in ACL
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KUALA LUMPUR - Two-time champion Guangzhou Evergrande has been handed a potentially bumpy ride to the knockout stages of the 2018 Asian Champions League after the draw for the group phase of next year's competition was made on Wednesday.

item.title: Evergrande faces tricky test in ACL
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KUALA LUMPUR - Two-time champion Guangzhou Evergrande has been handed a potentially bumpy ride to the knockout stages of the 2018 Asian Champions League after the draw for the group phase of next year's competition was made on Wednesday.

item.title: Zorro-loving Shakhtar puts City to the sword
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KHARKIV, Ukraine - Shakhtar Donetsk advanced to the knockout stage of the Champions League with a 2-1 victory over Manchester City on Wednesday, prompting the Ukrainian club's coach to attend his media conference dressed as Zorro.

item.title: Zorro-loving Shakhtar puts City to the sword
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KHARKIV, Ukraine - Shakhtar Donetsk advanced to the knockout stage of the Champions League with a 2-1 victory over Manchester City on Wednesday, prompting the Ukrainian club's coach to attend his media conference dressed as Zorro.

item.title: Zorro-loving Shakhtar puts City to the sword
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: KHARKIV, Ukraine - Shakhtar Donetsk advanced to the knockout stage of the Champions League with a 2-1 victory over Manchester City on Wednesday, prompting the Ukrainian club's coach to attend his media conference dressed as Zorro.

item.title: IOC cuts funding for amateurs until problems solved
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) on Wednesday said it will make no more payments to the International Amateur Boxing federation (AIBA) until that body's problems over governance and finances are sorted out.

item.title: IOC cuts funding for amateurs until problems solved
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) on Wednesday said it will make no more payments to the International Amateur Boxing federation (AIBA) until that body's problems over governance and finances are sorted out.

item.title: IOC cuts funding for amateurs until problems solved
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) on Wednesday said it will make no more payments to the International Amateur Boxing federation (AIBA) until that body's problems over governance and finances are sorted out.

item.title: IOC cuts funding for amateurs until problems solved
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: The International Olympic Committee (IOC) on Wednesday said it will make no more payments to the International Amateur Boxing federation (AIBA) until that body's problems over governance and finances are sorted out.

item.title: Mailman, Sina Weibo join hands to tap sports digital market
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: Mailman, one of China's leading sports marketing platforms, and Sina Weibo, China's social media giant, on Wednesday announced strategic partnership to deliver the next generation of technology in China's sports digital market.

item.title: Rival managers mocked in true Mourinho fashion
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MANCHESTER, England - Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho has aimed a subtle dig at Pep Guardiola and Arsene Wenger by declaring he would only tell "the truth" about the fitness of his players.

item.title: Rival managers mocked in true Mourinho fashion
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MANCHESTER, England - Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho has aimed a subtle dig at Pep Guardiola and Arsene Wenger by declaring he would only tell "the truth" about the fitness of his players.

item.title: Rival managers mocked in true Mourinho fashion
item.author: 中国日报-体育
item.description: MANCHESTER, England - Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho has aimed a subtle dig at Pep Guardiola and Arsene Wenger by declaring he would only tell "the truth" about the fitness of his players.
